name: Anhui Zhongyuan New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Zhongyuan New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of high precision purple copper belts in China. The company's purple copper belt is used as a material in communication cables, electric power cables, transformers, copper coated aluminum, lead frame materials, heat sinks, heat exchangers, new energy batteries, and other products. It serves communication, electronics, electric power, electrical equipment, and other industries. The company is headquartered in Wuhu, China.
